response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Spoken audio and song vocals phonetically match the provided Reference JSON lyrics for 'Hakudou'. 2. JSON Usage: Utilized JSON for song lyrics; manual transcription and translation were performed for the introduction title cards and the closing banter. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are strictly anchored to vocal triggers with precision. Visual events (title cards) were subtitled for their on-screen duration. Rapid banter was segmented to maintain readability and prevent cascading delays.

subtitles.original: ときのそら お披露目誕生日 2026
subtitles.english: [Title: Tokino Sora Birthday Party 2026]

subtitles.original: GUEST 響咲リオナ
subtitles.english: [Guest: Hibiki Riona]

subtitles.original: 僕等よ はじまれ
subtitles.english: Let us start,

subtitles.original: 青く青く 果てまで
subtitles.english: blue, blue, until the end.

subtitles.original: 拍動
subtitles.english: [Song: Hakudou]

subtitles.original: 蘭の底 目を開けたバースデイ
subtitles.english: A birthday where I opened my eyes at the bottom of the orchid

subtitles.original: ホームシックにやられそうなバス停
subtitles.english: A bus stop that feels like it's getting homesick

subtitles.original: 何処に居たって足りない 命は一つずつ足りない
subtitles.english:
No matter where you are, it's not enough,
each life is not enough

subtitles.original: 未だ 羽ばたくのは脳内にて
subtitles.english: Still, flapping wings in the brain

subtitles.original: 終わらないで 未だ 不思議な夢を見る
subtitles.english: Don't end, still, dreaming a strange dream

subtitles.original: 二人なら 何処までも行けると どうしてか 信じたくなる
subtitles.english:
If it's the two of us, I wonder why,
I want to believe we can go anywhere

subtitles.original: 跳ねる鼓動 誰を呼ぶの ベルの音
subtitles.english:
Beating heart, who are you calling?
The sound of a bell

subtitles.original: 座して待てど春夏秋冬 孵化は自分主導
subtitles.english:
Even if I wait and sit, the four seasons,
hatching is my own initiative

subtitles.original: あっという間に終わる祭りを前に 恐れさえも笑い合おう
subtitles.english:
Let's laugh together at the fear before
the festival that ends in no time

subtitles.original: 共に在ろう
subtitles.english: Let's exist together,

subtitles.original: 至って不完全体 故に面白くなってきた
subtitles.english:
quite an imperfect body,
so it's become interesting.

subtitles.original: 空腹の夜を越え 空白に願い唱え
subtitles.english:
Overcoming the hungry night,
singing prayers to the void

subtitles.original: 諦め尽くされた世界を 君とふたり占めに転げ廻る
subtitles.english:
Rolling around, taking the world that was given up on
for just the two of us

subtitles.original: 混ざり合い、そして生まれ変わるような
subtitles.english: Mixing together, and as if being reborn,

subtitles.original: きっと僕達だけが成せる パレード
subtitles.english: surely it's a parade only we can accomplish.

subtitles.original: 絶対 証明したい 進化したい 才能超えた新形態
subtitles.english:
Absolutely, I want to prove it, I want to evolve,
a new form beyond talent

subtitles.original: さあ 想像次第 「どうなりたい?"
subtitles.english:
Come on, depending on your imagination
"What do you want to become?"

subtitles.original: 斯くも現実は不可能を敷き詰めたがり
subtitles.english: Thus, reality likes to fill itself with the impossible

subtitles.original: 過去の惜別と睨めっこしたって憂うばかり
subtitles.english:
Even if I stare at the farewells of the past,
I only feel melancholic

subtitles.original: 今はそこに君が居る 未知なるバージョン
subtitles.english: Now you are there, an unknown version

subtitles.original: 覚醒前夜 まだ名も無きヒーロー 行こうか
subtitles.english:
The eve of awakening,
still a nameless hero, shall we go?

subtitles.original: 僕等よ はじまれ
subtitles.english: Let us start,

subtitles.original: 青く青く 果てまで
subtitles.english: blue, blue, until the end.

subtitles.original: 至って不完全体 故に面白くなってきた
subtitles.english:
Quite an imperfect body,
so it's become interesting.

subtitles.original: 空腹の夜を越え 空白に願い唱え
subtitles.english:
Overcoming the hungry night,
singing prayers to the void

subtitles.original: 諦め尽くされた世界を 君とふたり占めに転げ廻る
subtitles.english:
Rolling around, taking the world that was given up on
for just the two of us

subtitles.original: 混ざり合い、そして生まれ変わるような
subtitles.english: Mixing together, and as if being reborn,

subtitles.original: きっと僕達こそが成せる パレード
subtitles.english: surely it's a parade only we can accomplish.

subtitles.original: 不完全体、美しきパレード
subtitles.english: An imperfect body, a beautiful parade.

subtitles.original: はい、というわけで、ゲストのリオナちゃんに来てもらいました！
subtitles.english: Alright, so Hibiki Riona has joined us as a guest!

subtitles.original: はーい！
subtitles.english: Hello!

subtitles.original: 東北の方で地震があったみたいですが、大丈夫でしょうか？
subtitles.english:
It seems there was an earthquake in the Tohoku region.
Is everyone okay?

subtitles.original: 東北の方、身の回りの安全を優先でお願いいします。気をつけるんだよー
subtitles.english:
To everyone in Tohoku, please prioritize
your safety. Stay safe!

subtitles.original: 気をつけてくださいー
subtitles.english: Please be careful!

subtitles.original: そして、次のゲストはリオナちゃんです！
subtitles.english: And our next guest is Riona-chan!

subtitles.original: はーい！Flow Glowのリーダー、響咲リオナです！ぷらぶらー。よろしくお願いします！
subtitles.english:
Yes! I'm the leader of Flow Glow, Hibiki Riona!
Pura-pura! Nice to meet you!

subtitles.original: そして、そら先輩、お誕生日おめでとうございます！
subtitles.english: And Sora-senpai, happy birthday!

subtitles.original: ありがとうございまーす！嬉しい！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much! I'm so happy!

subtitles.original: 今日はね、あの、最近めちゃくちゃ仲いいっていうのと、やっぱり...
subtitles.english:
Today, well, since we've been getting along so well
lately, and...

subtitles.original: めっちゃ仲いいですもんね！仲いい！
subtitles.english: We really have been, haven't we! We're close!

subtitles.original: 歌とダンスといえば、今はリオナちゃんってイメージがあって。
subtitles.english:
When it comes to singing and dancing,
I have this strong image of Riona-chan right now.

subtitles.original: 嬉しい！
subtitles.english: I'm so happy!

subtitles.original: 一緒に、あの、歌いたいと思って、呼んじゃいました！
subtitles.english: I really wanted to sing together, so I invited you!

subtitles.original: 本当に嬉しかったです、呼んでもらえた時！
subtitles.english: I was truly happy when you invited me!

subtitles.original: イェーイ！それよりそれより！
subtitles.english: Yay! But more importantly!

subtitles.original: そら先輩！なんですか、新衣装じゃないですか！
subtitles.english: Sora-senpai! Look at that, you're in a new outfit!

subtitles.original: そら先輩、めちゃくちゃ可愛い！
subtitles.english: Sora-senpai, you're so cute!

subtitles.original: ありがとうございまーす！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much!

subtitles.original: どんな衣装なんですか？
subtitles.english: What kind of outfit is it?

subtitles.original: こちらはですね、去年出したアルバムの『パルス』っていうジャケットで、使った衣装なんですけど...
subtitles.english:
This is the outfit I used for the cover of my album
"Pulse," which was released last year...
